form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (20.58) at Hobart in a Grade 4, finishing eighth and beaten 16 lengths. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from seven starts. Looks suited and should go close.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 340m at Hobart beaten 1.5 lengths (19.53) behind Rojo Jojo in a Grade 4 on April 2. Has clocked a fast 16.09 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.
